zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Herrberger於大約1380年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾明日香時，她的父親Thomas Harberger21歲，母親Margaret Sutton20歲。她和William de Weston VI至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1460年在英國盧特藍德歐阿哈姆享年81歲，埋葬在英國素瑞素瓦可 可利斯丘其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Herrberger于大约1380年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾明日香时，她的父亲Thomas Harberger21岁，母亲Margaret Sutton20岁。她和William de Weston VI至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1460年在英国盧特藍德歐阿哈姆享年81岁，埋葬在英国素瑞素瓦可 可利斯丘其。

nameMeanings.name: Herrberger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swiss German: habitational name for someone from Hersberg (pronounced Herschbrg in Swiss German) in the canton of Basel, Switzerland. Compare Herschberger and Hirschberger .

History: This is the name of a Swiss Mennonite and Amish family, originating from the canton of Basel, Switzerland, which in the 17th century, because of religious persecution, spread to the Palatinate, Germany, where it was altered to Herschberger and Hirschberger before being brought to North America the middle of the 18th century. The original form of the surname, Hersberger, is apparently not found among the American Mennonites and Amish; the most common form of the name among them is Hershberger .

variants.name: Herschberger
meanings: German: altered form of Swiss German   Hersberger  .

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from any of several places called Herschberg, for example one near Kaiserslautern, or a variant of   Hirschberger  . This surname is very rare in Germany. Compare   Hershberger  .

History: This (see 1 above) is the name of a Swiss Mennonite and Amish family, originally spelled Hersberger , but in Germany altered to Herschberger and Hirschberger . It was brought to North America the middle of the 18th century by several Mennonite and Amish immigrants from the Palatinate, Germany; they settled in PA. The form Herschberger is still found among the Mennonites and Amish in the US, but the most common one among them is Hershberger .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Herrberger was born about 1380, in Langley, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, Thomas Harberger, was 21 and her mother, Margaret Sutton, was 20. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with William de Weston VI. She died in 1460, in Oakham, Rutland, England, at the age of 81, and was buried in Southwark Christchurch, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Herrberger est née environ 1380, à Langley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Harberger, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret Sutton, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec William de Weston VI. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Oakham, Rutland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterrée à Southwark Christchurch, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Herrberger um 1380 in Langley, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Harberger 21 und ihre Mutter Margaret Sutton 20. Sie hatte mit William de Weston VI mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1460 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Oakham, Rutland, England und wurde in Southwark Christchurch, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Herrberger è nata il circa 1380 nel Langley, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Harberger, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Margaret Sutton, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con William de Weston VI. Morì nel 1460, nel Oakham, Rutland, England, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolta a Southwark Christchurch, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda Herrbergerが約1380年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアラングリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Harbergerは21歳，母Margaret Suttonは20歳であった。彼女はWilliam de Weston VIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1460年にイギリスルトランドオアクハムで81歳で死去し，イギリススリーソウスワーク チリストチャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Herrberger(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 벅잉함실르 랭글리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Harberger(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Sutton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 William de Weston VI(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 루틀랜드 카에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 소우스워크 크리스트c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Herrberger nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Langley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Harberger, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Sutton, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com William de Weston VI. Ela faleceu em 1460, em Oakham, Rutland, Inglaterra, com 81 anos, e foi sepultada em Southwark Christchurch, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Herrberger родилась около 1380 г. в местности лангли, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Harberger было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Sutton, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от William de Weston VI. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности оахам, рутланд, Англия в возрасте 81 год и была похоронена в местности соутварк крисчурч, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Herrberger nació aproximadamente 1380, en Langley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Harberger, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret Sutton, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con William de Weston VI. Murió en 1460, en Oakham, Rutland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultada en Southwark Christchurch, Surrey, Inglaterra.
